title: Count Complete Subarrays in an Array
titleCn: 统计完全子数组的数目

testcases.input: nums = [1,3,1,2,2] Output: 4 Explanation: The complete subarrays are the following: [1,3,1,2], [1,3,1,2,2], [3,1,2] and [3,1,2,2].
testcases.expectedOutput: 4 Explanation: The complete subarrays are the following: [1,3,1,2], [1,3,1,2,2], [3,1,2] and [3,1,2,2].

testcases.input: nums = [5,5,5,5] Output: 10 Explanation: The array consists only of the integer 5, so any subarray is complete. The number of subarrays that we can choose is 10.
testcases.expectedOutput: 10 Explanation: The array consists only of the integer 5, so any subarray is complete. The number of subarrays that we can choose is 10.
